  "bullets": "[\"One 8.8 oz box of RITZ Bits Cheese Sandwich Crackers (packaging may vary)\",\"Smooth and creamy cheese spread between two tiny RITZ snack crackers\",\"Bite-sized, mini crackers featuring filling made with real cheese and containing no high-fructose corn syrup for a deliciously crunchy snack\",\"RITZ snack crackers with cheese that make great office snacks and after-school snacks for kids and adults; wonderful on the go snacks and travel snacks\",\"Box of cheese and crackers for anytime, anywhere snacking\",\"Packaging may vary.   "description": "Enjoy a tiny take on the classic RITZ cheese cracker sandwiches you know and love with RITZ Bits Cheese Sandwich Crackers. The bite-sized snacks layer a delicious, cheese spread between two tiny, crispy and flaky RITZ Bits crackers. Made with real cheese and containing no high-fructose corn syrup, these RITZ crackers are convenient lunch snacks, travel snacks, school snacks, and afternoon snacks for kids and adults. Just the right size for snacking, these tiny round crackers and cheese hit the spot when you're looking for lightly salty snacks with creamy cheese filling. Tuck these mini crackers into lunchboxes and backpacks for midday treats, or grab some of these cheese crackers to enjoy as you head out the door. RITZ is a rich, buttery cracker that invites sharing because it welcomes every person, flavor, and pairing. With RITZ Bits Cheese Sandwich Crackers, you'll be ready for any snacking occasion.",
